title: Scallop-LR
author: Shao, Mingfu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Scallop-LR is a reference-based transcript assembler for long-reads RNA-seq data ( https://github.com/Kingsford-Group/scallop/tree/isoseq-v0.9.2 ). Its method has been described in the manuscript at  bioRxiv . The datasets and scripts used in the manuscript to illustrate its performance are available at ( https://github.com/Kingsford-Group/lrassemblyanalysis ).
steps_raw: Scallop-LR is a reference-based transcript assembler for long-reads RNA-seq data ( https://github.com/Kingsford-Group/scallop/tree/isoseq-v0.9.2 ). Its method has been described in the manuscript at  bioRxiv . The datasets and scripts used in the manuscript to illustrate its performance are available at ( https://github.com/Kingsford-Group/lrassemblyanalysis ).
